title: androrchis mascula subsp. longicalcarata
intro: Androrchis mascula subsp. longicalcarata, also known as the long-spurred orchid, is a subspecies of orchid native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Androrchis mascula subsp. longicalcarata include its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to help reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support kidney function. In herbal preparations, Androrchis mascula subsp. longicalcarata can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
